name: Thick Chocolate Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwave-safe bowl, combine the first four ingredients.
2. Stir in milk until smooth.
3. Microwave, uncovered, on HIGH for 3 minutes; stir.
4. Microwave 4-6 minutes longer or until thickened, stirring after each minute.
5. Stir in vanilla.
6. Pour into individual serving dishes; cool.
7. Refrigerate.
8. Garnish with whipped topping if desired.
